positive: A symmetrical, circular mandala-style design featuring a stylized celestial forest landscape. The composition should depict geometric mountains, abstract winding river lines, and luminous, simplified botanical elements (ferns, pines). Use a highly contrasting color palette of deep indigo blue, ethereal silver, emerald green, and burnt orange accents. The style must resemble clean vector line art combined with detailed tattoo flash work, emphasizing strong silhouettes and negative space. Central, balanced, symmetrical, suitable for apparel screen printing, intricate detailing, high-contrast illustration.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, poorly rendered hands, extra limbs, blurry, noisy, fuzzy, deformed, artifact, grain, messy, low detail, realistic photo, photographic, gradient, bad anatomy
